title: Opening for Software Engineer at Housing.com

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at Housing.com
jsonLd.description:
Join the Housing.com family as a Software Engineer in Ludhiana. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Housing.com:
Housing.com is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Housing.com!
